name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, overdue invoices cause cash flow gaps. We automate follow-ups instead of manual reminders.
problem_solved: Overdue invoices causing cash flow issues.
features: Basic analytics dashboard for overdue invoices
